name: Grow Fingerprint Reader
description: The `fingerprint_grow` component allows you to use your R307, R503, R503-RGB, ZFM-20, ... fingerprint sensors with ESPHome.

config_entries.label: Password
config_entries.description: Password to use for authentication. Defaults to `0x00`.

config_entries.label: Sensing Pin
config_entries.description: Pin connected to the reader's finger detection signal (WAKEUP) output.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Sensor Power Pin
config_entries.description: Output pin responsible for toogling the sensor power on and off.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: UART ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the UART hub.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Idle Period To Sleep
config_entries.description: The sensor idle period to wait before powering it off (sleep). Defaults to `5s`. See [Sleep Mode](https://esphome.io/components/fingerprint_grow#fingerprint_grow-sleep_mode) for more information.

config_entries.label: New Password
config_entries.description: Sets a new password to use for authentication. See [Setting a New Password](https://esphome.io/components/fingerprint_grow#fingerprint_grow-set_new_password) for more information.
